description: Ground truth for 10-extractor system on Joshua Zimmer intro call (2026-05-13). Josh is the top revenue producer at Hash Directors. This call covered referral network mapping and BD strategy.

assertions.description: Tara AG identified as an active deal — RWA project tokenizing US farmland, referred by Mike Katz
assertions.transcript_quote: terra ag is a rwa project trying to token as far land in the u.s.
assertions.check: JSON contains an entry for 'Tara AG' or 'Terra AG' as an RWA/real-world-assets deal

assertions.description: Cedar (Atlas wallet DAO) identified as active deal with $22K→$30K fee and ongoing founder dispute
assertions.transcript_quote: cedar. Is a or was a unincorporated DAO in the us they built like a wallet infrastructure called Atlas wallet... the fee is actually pretty good so it's it's 22 but it bumps up to 30
assertions.check: JSON contains an entry for 'Cedar' as a DAO/foundation with Atlas wallet, $22K-$30K fee, came from TTA/Travers Thorp Alberga

assertions.description: Correction: deals before Feb 2024 were inherited from departing directors, not Josh's organic wins. Josh joined ~2 years ago when two senior people left.
assertions.transcript_quote: when I joined. Two other senior people left so I kind of assumed I assumed quite a large number of their respective books
assertions.check: JSON captures that pre-Feb-2024 deals in Josh's book were inherited, not organically won by Josh — a data correction for referrer/win attribution

assertions.description: Plume (RWA, gold storage) is a lost deal — currently with Horizons, in-house counsel blocked the switch
assertions.transcript_quote: plume, and this is very sensitive information... They won't move because they're currently with horizons... they got in-house legal counsel and the in-house... said they'll just sit as the supervisor
assertions.check: JSON contains an entry for 'Plume' as a lost deal, currently with Horizons, blocked by in-house counsel

assertions.description: Mike Katz: NY-based lawyer, has sent multiple deals to Hash, best relationship is with Carl, sent Tara AG
assertions.transcript_quote: Mike katz has sent us work in the past this it might be the third one that he sent us
assertions.check: JSON identifies Mike Katz as a multi-deal referrer, NY-based lawyer, with Carl as the primary relationship holder

assertions.description: TTA = Travers Thorp Alberga (Cayman law firm) referred Cedar
assertions.transcript_quote: So that came from tta actually. TTA. Is that a law firm? Travers throughout alberta so it's the acronym for that it's a law firm in the Cayman Islands
assertions.check: JSON identifies TTA (Travers Thorp Alberga) as a Cayman law firm that referred Cedar

assertions.description: Leeward named as primary competitor — Josh worked there before Hash; known for large book sizes ('one guy sits on 500 entities')
assertions.transcript_quote: you're going to hear them loads and you probably already have I work [at Leeward]... one guy sits on 500 funds or 500 entities
assertions.check: JSON identifies Leeward as a named competitor with the distinguishing weakness that one director covers 500+ entities (contrast with Hash's attention model)

assertions.description: Josh to respond to Perkins email thread (Anoop saw response come in at start of call)
assertions.transcript_quote: Do you want me to follow up with that email thread? Because I saw she just responded... I'll. But I definitely want to get them in front of a call
assertions.check: JSON contains an action item owned by Josh (counterparty) to respond to or follow up with the Perkins email thread

assertions.description: Josh to give Anoop a walkthrough of the master program (proprietary sales tool) — not sent externally
assertions.transcript_quote: I'll try to jump off at, like, 3 45 and kind of learn that before... I can give I can also give you a 10 minute rundown as well
assertions.check: JSON contains an action item for Anoop to get a master program walkthrough from Josh

assertions.description: Josh and wife Cat expecting second child; first child turns 3 in July
assertions.transcript_quote: me and cat are expecting our second kid... You'll be three in July
assertions.check: JSON captures that Josh is expecting a second child with wife Cat; first child turning 3 in July

assertions.description: Josh had Fat Joe hold his baby for birth announcement card; people have kept the card for 3 years
assertions.transcript_quote: the guy who was being shot by him before. Right before this was fat Joe... we sent that out as, like, the birth announcement
assertions.check: JSON captures the Fat Joe / birth announcement card story as a personal rapport detail

assertions.description: Josh previously worked at Leeward (Hash's primary competitor) before joining Hash ~2 years ago
assertions.transcript_quote: I worked at a previous fiduciary firm leeward
assertions.check: JSON captures that Josh previously worked at Leeward before joining Hash

assertions.description: Josh wins ~70% of clients who get on a master program call — proprietary sales tool is pivotal
assertions.transcript_quote: I win way more than 50 like probably like 70% of the clients that I get on a call with I'll win it give or take that master program is is pivotal
assertions.check: JSON captures Josh's ~70% close rate on master program calls as a non-public performance fact

assertions.description: SENSITIVE: Plume and Arkham share an operations manager who doesn't know each company knows he works for the other — intelligence risk
assertions.transcript_quote: plume and arkham share. An artem intelligence share a operations manager. They don't each other know they know this guy works for a different company
assertions.check: JSON captures this sensitive fact with do_not_share_externally: true flagged

assertions.description: Scent Advisors: India-based, helps foundations/projects with incorporation to filings — like Lemma but doesn't sit on multisigs
assertions.transcript_quote: So they are a India based... they help facilitate foundations and different projects to spin up their kind of foundation and operations... kind of like lemma but they don't sit on multisigs
assertions.check: JSON identifies Scent Advisors as a third-party India-based foundation services firm (Lemma-adjacent) worth tracking
